one_line_summary: Solid ADR, wired /tdd slash command and orchestrator via run_agent with coherent docs, but RED detection is a brittle substring check and tests don't verify real failing-test semantics.
strengths: ADR precedes impl, names alternatives, and spells out the six-phase Driver/Navigator contract
Real REPL wiring via /tdd with both sync and async dispatcher handlers, help entry, and sidebar
Reuses run_agent with coder/reviewer personas instead of reinventing infrastructure
weaknesses: RED-vs-GREEN distinction relies on LLM self-report substring matching ('pass'/'fail'), not actual test exit codes
Tests only assert phase header strings and call counts; don't verify refactor proposal is threaded into phase 5 prompt or real assertion-failure surfacing
Minor code smells: reaches into engine._config private attrs, unused imports (AsyncMock, MagicMock, logging), retry loop leaves driver_res_red potentially unbound on error paths
